message:
Handle asset:// URLs for iMessage attachments

asset:// URLs contain hex-encoded local file paths after the account ID
(e.g., asset://imessage_.../2f55736572732f... decodes to /Users/jesse/...).
Decode the hex path and copy the file directly instead of hitting the
download API which rejects non-mxc URLs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
